mapper.select: SELECT statistics_data_table.num_value, SUM(statistics_data_table.num_key * statistics_data_table.num_count) AS statistics_result FROM statistics_data_table WHERE statistics_data_table.push_operator = #{operator} AND DATE(statistics_data_table.push_time) = DATE(#{push_time}) GROUP BY statistics_data_table.num_value ORDER BY statistics_data_table.num_value ASC;
